Meta Investigation.impact: Gives the team full visibility into live ad copy at scale without manually opening each ad, making compliance and quality reviews fast and reliable.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans all collected ad copy for specified target phrases and flags every exact match with the ad ID, field name, and matched text.
Meta Investigation.impact: Catches every instance of a flagged phrase across potentially hundreds of ads in seconds, eliminating the risk of human review missing occurrences.

Meta Investigation.action: Emails a formatted report listing every flagged ad with the specific field and exact copy where each phrase match was found.
Meta Investigation.impact: Delivers a precise, actionable audit directly to the right person so flagged ads can be reviewed and corrected immediately without digging through dashboards.

summary: Our AI automation pipeline continues to grow strong, with 53 total agents across the board — 24 completed, 9 in progress, and 20 planned. No new agents were added to the pipeline this week, and no existing agents changed stages. While it was a quieter week on the tracker, our completed agents continue running in the background daily, weekly, and monthly — driving real output across email marketing, paid media, creator outreach, SEO, and operations. We're making steady progress toward a fully automated marketing engine, and the planned queue is packed with exciting builds on the horizon!
